title: TFC Gourmet
description: A modification for TFC and Firmalife, that provides food
body:
В TFC Gourmet

![icon of mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c89d1c5cf8b305796d61afd2cbbae0896165521.png)

Traditional World Cuisines for TerraFirmaCraft

В ![requirement](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Release-success?style=flat-square)
![requirement](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-All%20Rights%20Reserved-red?style=flat-square)
![requirement](https://img.shields.io/badge/Languages-EN%20%7C%20RU-blue?style=flat-square)

TFC Gourmet is an expansion addon for TerraFirmaCraft that adds authentic traditional dishes from Russian, Georgian, Moldovan, Italian, Asian, and Mediterranean cuisines, along with an advanced milk collection and cheese-making system. Experience gourmet cooking with over 50 new food items, 6 pizza varieties, traditional fermented foods, and a complete dairy production chain.


в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

рџЊџ WHAT THIS MOD ADDS

рџ§Ђ Complete Dairy & Cheese System
-  Milk Collection: Milk can now be collected from female musk oxen, sheep, and alpacas using buckets
-  Processing Chain: Transform milk through curdling в†’ curd production в†’ brinza cheese crafting
-  Three Cheese Varieties: Each animal type (musk ox, sheep, alpaca) produces unique brinza cheese
-  Sliceable Cheese Wheels: Place cheese wheels as decorative blocks and slice them with knives into 4 portions
-  Integration: Works with TFC's animal husbandry and familiarity systems
рџЌ• Italian Cuisine (8 items)
-  Six Pizza Varieties: Margherita, Pepperoni, Hawaiian, Four Cheeses, Four Meats, and Neapolitan - all craftable in ovens
-  Risotto: Classic Italian rice dish cooked in pots
-  Pasta with Adjika: Fusion pasta combining Italian cooking with Georgian spices
- рџҐџ Russian Cuisine (9 items)
-  Pelmeni: Traditional meat-filled dumplings
-  Vareniki: Dumplings with multiple filling varieties
-  Oladyi: Russian pancakes cooked on griddles
-  Syrniki: Cottage cheese pancakes made from curd
-  Sauerkraut: Fermented cabbage prepared in barrels
-  Porridge: Three varieties - plain, with honey, and with fruits
- рџҐ– Georgian & Caucasian Cuisine (5 items)
-  Khachapuri: Traditional Georgian cheese-filled bread baked in ovens
-  Chebureki: Deep-fried meat turnovers
-  Adjika: Spicy Georgian condiment used in various recipes
-  Adjika Bread: Bread with adjika spread
-  Dolma: Meat and rice wrapped in grape leaves
- рџЌІ Moldovan Cuisine (3 items)
-  Zama: Traditional chicken soup with vegetables and bran
-  Mamaliga: Cornmeal porridge similar to polenta
-  Placinda: Moldovan layered pastry with various fillings
- рџЌњ Asian Cuisine (7 items)
-  Ramen: Four varieties with different proteins - bacon, beef, camelidae (llama/alpaca), and chevon (goat)
-  Fried Rice: Asian-style fried rice with vegetables and proteins
-  Curry: Aromatic curry dish cooked in pots
-  Pho: Vietnamese rice noodle soup with herbs
- рџҐ™ Mediterranean & Middle Eastern Cuisine (8 items)
-  Hummus: Chickpea spread with tahini and spices
-  Greek Salad: Fresh salad with tomatoes, cucumbers, and cheese
-  Tzatziki: Greek yogurt sauce with cucumber and garlic
-  Falafel: Deep-fried chickpea balls
-  Lavash Wrap: Middle Eastern flatbread wrap with fillings
-  Goulash: Hungarian meat stew with vegetables
- рџҐ¤ Beverages (3 items)
-  Compote: Traditional fruit drink prepared in barrels
-  Kvass: Fermented rye beverage made in vats
-  Lemonade: Refreshing citrus drink
рџ”§ Crafting Integration
- All recipes are fully integrated with TerraFirmaCraft and Firmalife systems:
-  TFC heating system for cooking raw foods
-  Barrel recipes for fermentation and curdling
-  Pot recipes for soups, stews, and boiled dishes
-  Oven recipes for baking (pizzas, breads, pastries)
-  Vat recipes for beverages
-  Knife interaction with cheese wheels for slicing

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ

рџЋ® HOW TO USE
- Milk & Cheese Production
- 1. Tame or domesticate female musk oxen, sheep, or alpacas
- 2. Wait for animals to become familiar with you
- 3. Use a bucket on ready animals to collect milk
- 4. Process milk in barrels to create curdled milk
- 5. Craft curd from curdled milk
- 6. Shape curd into brinza cheese wheels
- 7. Place wheels as blocks and use knives to slice portions (4 per wheel)
- Cooking Foods
-  Most raw foods require heating using TFC's firepit or forge
-  Use clay pots for soups, stews, and boiled dishes
-  Bake breads, pizzas, and pastries in brick ovens
-  Ferment foods like sauerkraut and kvass in barrels
-  Create beverages using vats
-  Check recipe viewer (JEI/REI) for specific crafting steps

в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ


рџЊЌ LOCALIZATION
вњ… English (en_us) - Full translation
вњ… Russian (ru_ru) - РџРѕР»РЅР°СЏ Р»РѕРєР°Р»РёР·Р°С†РёСЏ
All items, foods, blocks, and descriptions are fully localized in both languages.
